data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Normal) will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Period: 5/4 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 5/11 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
